title: German Almond Apple Strudel
description: A classic German dessert with a delicious combination of apples, almonds, and spices. Perfect for a warm evening or as a snack.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, and salt.
Add melted butter and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until smooth.
Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
In a separate bowl, mix sliced apples, chopped almonds, and vanilla extract.
Spread the apple mixture onto one half of the dough, leaving a 1/2 inch border.
Fold the other half of the dough over the apple mixture and press edges to seal.
Brush the top with melted butter and sprinkle with cinnamon.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until golden brown.
Serve warm with a scoop of vanilla ice cream, if desired.
